---
title: "Beyond Autocomplete"
subtitle: "AI-Assisted Coding with GitHub Copilot"
author: "Full-day workshop"
notebook-links: false
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    code-block-height: 400px
    highlight-style: github
    footer: "energy_pipeline — built step by step"
    progress: true
    chalkboard: false
    logo: ""
    css: slides-custom.css
---

{{< include slides.body.qmd >}}
